loan_requestment_no.text: เลขที่คำขอกู้

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ,'SD MONTH YYYY') as requestment_date_thai ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ,'SD/MM/YYYY') as requestment_date ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as age_life_text ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long( sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no ) as position_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no) as member_group_name ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.req_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_req_coll.req_amount) as req_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount) as loan_request_amount_thai
--ที่อยู่ ,sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no ,sc_mem_m_member_address.moo ,sc_mem_m_member_address.road ,sc_mem_m_member_address.soi ,pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol) as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code) as district_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code) as province_name ,sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no,1) as telephone ,(select sc_mem_m_member_work_info.work_telephone from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where membership_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no) as work_telephone ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_member_address ,sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_cnt_m_coop
where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '1'
/*WHERE*/
